leads.diagnosis: Big J Exterior Restorations already has a website, but it likely undersells the real business. The redesign opportunity is to improve clarity, trust, and the path from interest to booking or enquiry. Make the current site feel more credible than the existing version. Clarify the next step so mobile visitors can act faster. The biggest revenue leak is usually weak quote intent and unclear trust on mobile.
leads.coldMessage: Hey Big, I looked at Big J Exterior Restorations in Brisbane. Uses a Gmail address and presents roof restoration alongside painting and pressure washing. I took a look at the current site and mocked up a version that makes the offer clearer and the next step easier for mobile visitors. Happy to send the mockup if you want to see it.
